name: Pinnacor Inc.
description: Pinnacor Inc. was a provider of financial information, market data, and investment-analysis tools, formerly known as ScreamingMedia. The company specialized in content syndication and Internet-based personalized financial services. In 2003, Pinnacor was acquired by MarketWatch.com, Inc. in a transaction valued at approximately $103 million, aimed at creating a leading provider of online financial news and data. Following the merger, the combined entity integrated Pinnacor's technology and data capabilities to enhance its financial information offerings for investors and media partners.
